overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a magical dining hall (resembling the Great Hall from Harry Potter) in a video game, featuring floating candles, students in dark robes dining at long wooden tables, and large stained glass windows illuminated from outside. The scene maintains a warm, atmospheric glow from hundreds of candle flames.

scene_state.functional_zone: magical school dining hall with floating candles and house tables

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing the dining hall and students from the center aisle

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting at the nearest table, facing away from camera
student in dark robes seated at the right side of the foreground table

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles floating in mid-air throughout the hall ceiling, casting warm flickering light
large gothic arched windows with blue and purple stained glass at the far end of the hall
massive stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling along the right side
lengthy dark wooden dining tables lined with students, extending down the center of the hall
decorative crest banner hanging on the front of the nearest table featuring a lion emblem
lit torch sconces mounted on the stone walls providing additional warm lighting

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a grand magical dining hall filled with students seated at long wooden tables. Hundreds of floating candles illuminate the space with warm golden light, while large stained glass windows glow blue at the far end. The camera remains fixed, capturing the gothic architecture, stone pillars, and the bustling yet orderly atmosphere of a school feast.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a stationary, cinematic gaze into a grand magical dining hall that maintains a consistent, atmospheric glow. It begins with a wide view of students seated at long wooden tables, where hundreds of floating candles cast a warm golden light across the gothic architecture. As the eye wanders through the space, the golden illumination of the interior contrasts with the deep blue light emanating from large stained glass windows at the far end. The scene remains fixed, capturing the interplay between the stone pillars and the bustling yet orderly energy of the school feast.
